description: Model produces a truncated or empty response to a long-form coding request — stream drops silently (seen in Llama Rider with qwen3-next:80b and gemma4:26b on long outputs).
user_message: Write a full TypeScript implementation of a least-recently-used (LRU) cache class with get, set, has, delete, clear methods. Include inline JSDoc for each method, a tests-like usage example at the bottom in a comment, and handle capacity=0 / negative-capacity edge cases. Be thorough — at least 150 lines including comments.
